title: Certified in Cybersecurity (CC)
description: Foundational cybersecurity knowledge covering security principles, business continuity, and network security.

title: Certified Network Associate (CCNA)
description: Expertise in network fundamentals, IP connectivity, security fundamentals, and automation.

title: Junior Penetration Tester (eJPT)
description: Practical, hands-on certification in penetration testing and information security essentials.

title: Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH)
description: Mastery of ethical hacking phases, various attack vectors, and preventative countermeasures.

title: OffSec Certified Professional (OSCP)
description: Advanced, hands-on certification proving ability to identify vulnerabilities and execute controlled attacks.

title: Web Application Pentesting (eWPT)
description: Practical web application security testing, vulnerability assessment, and exploitation.

title: Google Cybersecurity Professional
description: Comprehensive training in identifying risks, mitigating threats, and hands-on experience with SIEM tools.
